trendOverride.reason: No trend override: quality 100/88, trend 75/100, sentiment neutral.

authenticity.notes: Authenticity check passed: article has enough specificity, business relevance, source alignment, and trend support.

notes: The content demonstrates strong practical value and avoids generic AI advice
Addresses specific business problems with concrete implementation steps
Content is focused on real use cases like CRM follow-up workflows with measurable KPIs
Content aligns well with target audience needs (founders, operators, marketers)
Uses business outcomes as the success metric rather than content volume
recommendedFixes: Add a brief example of memory in action to illustrate the concept more clearly
Include a simple workflow diagram to complement the step-by-step section
Add 1-2 more specific metrics or case study results to strengthen examples
Define 'memory' more concretely in the intro—what counts as 'memory' in AI systems
Include 1-2 short paragraphs on how memory improves outcomes vs. memoryless systems
